oathauth-desc: Waxay bixisaa taageero aqoonsi oo ku salaysan HMAC erayo sir ah oo hal-mar ah iyo hab-maamuuska WebAuthn
recover2faforuser: Dib u soo celi xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo ee isticmaalaha
oathauth-secret: Furaha sirta ah ee xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo:
oathauth-recoverycodes: Isticmaal tan haddii aad lumiso gelitaanka hababkaaga xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo.
oathauth-recoverycodes-important: Tallaabadani waa muhiim! Ha ka boodin tallaabadan!
oathauth-recoverycodes-neveragain: Koodhadhkan mar dambe lama muujin doono!
oathauth-recoverytokens-createdat: Koodhadhka soo kabashada waa la sameeyay: $1
oathauth-recoverycodes-copy-success: Koodhadhka soo kabashada waxaa lagu koobiyeeyay sabuuraddaada!
oathauth-recoverycodes-create-label: Abuur {{PLURAL:$1|koodh cusub oo soo kabasho|koodhadh cusub oo soo kabasho}}
oathauth-recoverycodes-too-many-instance: In ka badan hal koodh oo soo kabasho ayaa laga helay keydka xogta ee isticmaalahan.
oathauth-recoverycodes-exist: Waxaad hore u haysatay koodhadh soo kabasho. Halkan waa mar kale si aad u nuquliso ama u soo dejiso meel ammaan ah.
oathauth-recoverycodes-header-create: Abuur koodhadh cusub oo soo kabasho
oathauth-recoverycodes-regenerate-warnin: Haddii aad abuurto {{PLURAL:$1|koodh cusub oo soo kabasho|koodhadh cusub oo soo kabasho}}, koodhadhkaagii asalka ahaa ee soo kabashada {{PLURAL:$1|koodh|koodhadh}} mar dambe ma shaqayn doonaan.
oathauth-recoverycodes-temporary-desc: {{PLURAL:$1|koodh dheeraad ah|koodhadh dheeraad ah oo gaaraya $1}}, kuwaas oo dhacaya $2.
oathauth-recoverycodes-temporary-intro: {{PLURAL:$1|Koodhkan waa|Koodhadhkan waa}} la soo saaray oo laguugu soo diray iimayl markii aad codsatay caawimo si aad dib ugu soo ceshato gelitaanka xisaabtaada. {{PLURAL:$1|Wuxuu|Waxay}} shaqeynayaa muddo kooban waxaana gacanta looga saari karaa hore.
oathauth-recoverycodes-temporary-remove-: Ka saar koodhka soo kabashada ku-meelgaarka ah {{PLURAL:$1|koodh|koodhadh}}

Waxaad ku dhowdahay inaad ka saarto koodhka soo kabashada ku-meelgaarka ah {{PLURAL:$1|koodh|koodhadh}}, kaas oo aad heshay qayb ka mid ah habka soo kabashada xisaabta. Hubi inaad haysato habab kale oo xaqiijin laba-tallaabo ah, si aad weli ugu soo geli karto xisaabtaada.
Koodhka soo kabashada ku-meelgaarka ah {{PLURAL:$1|waa la saaray|waa laga saaray}}. Koodhadhka kale ee soo kabashada {{PLURAL:$2|wuu sii jiraa|way sii jiraan}}.
oathauth-failedtovalidateoath: Khalad ayaa dhacay markii la isku dayayay in la xaqiijiyo koodhka ka yimid barnaamijkaaga xaqiijinta. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
oathauth-validatedoath: Xogta xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo waa la xaqiijiyay. Xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo hadda waa la dhaqan gelin doonaa.
notification-body-oathauth-disable-remai: Weli {{PLURAL:$3|wuu jiraa qalab dheeraad ah|waxaa jira $3 qalab oo dheeraad ah}} oo ku xiran {{GENDER:$2|xisaabtaada}}.
notification-body-oathauth-enable: Haddii {{GENDER:$2|aad}} aadan tan samayn, {{GENDER:$2|xisaabtaada}} waxaa laga yaabaa in la jabsaday.
notification-header-oathauth-recoverycod: {{GENDER:$2|Adigu}} waa inaad dib ugu diiwaangelisaa {{GENDER:$2|xisaabtaada}} xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo.
oathauth-error-multiple-modules: Waqtigan xaadirka ah, lama taageero isticmaalka habab badan oo xaqiijin laba-tallaabo ah. Waxaad kaliya awood u yeelan kartaa $1 ka dib marka aad damiso $2.
oathauth-password-label: Deji eray-sir adag si aad u ilaaliso xisaabtaada.
oathauth-authenticator-placeholder: Ku dar tallaabo dheeraad ah marka aad gelayso si loo xoojiyo amniga xisaabtaada.
oathauth-delete-warning: Mar dambe ma awoodi doontid inaad isticmaasho habkan xaqiijinta si aad u gasho.
oathauth-delete-confirm-box: Geli "{{int:oathauth-authenticator-delete-text}}" si aad u sii wadato
oathauth-delete-warning-final: Ka saarista habkan waxay gabi ahaanba damin doontaa xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo. Tani sidoo kale waxay tirtiri doontaa koodhadhka soo kabashada iyo furayaasha gelitaanka. Tani waxay ka dhigi doontaa xisaabtaada mid amni ahaan liidata.
oathauth-delete-wrong-confirm-message: Gelin khaldan oo loogu talagalay ka saarista furaha ugu dambeeya. Fadlan ku qor "{{int:oathauth-authenticator-delete-text}}" si aad u sii wadato
oathauth-max-keys-exceeded: Xadka hababka xaqiijinta waa la gaaray
oathauth-max-keys-exceeded-message: Waxaad gaartay tirada ugu badan ee hababka xaqiijinta, taas oo ah $1. Fadlan ka saar hal hab oo xaqiijin ah ka hor intaadan ku darin mid cusub.
oathauth-passkeys-placeholder: Furayaasha gelitaanka ayaa ka ammaan badan eray-siraha, waxayna kuu oggolaanayaan inaad ku gasho si la mid ah sida aad u furto qalabkaaga.
oathauth-passkeys-no2fa: Si aad ugu darto furaha gelitaanka, waa inaad marka hore dejisaa xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo.
oathauth-passkey-dialog-text:
Furayaasha gelitaanka waa habka ugu ammaan badan ee aad ugu gali karto xisaabtaada. Dadka badankoodna waa habka ugu fudud.

Iyada oo furaha gelitaanka, waxaad ugu gali kartaa {{SITENAME}} si la mid ah sida aad u furto qalabkaaga, ha ahaato PIN, faro-qaadasho, ama aqoonsiga wejiga.

Si kasta oo aad u gasho, xogtaada biometric iyo PIN waxay ku sii jiraan qalabkaaga oo waligood nalooma soo diro.
oathauth-2fa-required: Waxaad ka tirsan tahay kooxo u baahan xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo.
oathauth-2fa-groups-notice-single:
Waxaad ka tirsan tahay {{PLURAL:$1|koox|kooxo}} {{PLURAL:$1|u baahan|u baahan yahay}} xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo ($2 ku jira $3). Si aad uga saarto habkan waa inaad:
  • ku darto hab kale oo xaqiijin laba-tallaabo ah, ama
  • naftaada ka saarto {{PLURAL:$1|kooxda|kooxaha}}. Fadlan booqo: $4
oathauth-2fa-groups-notice-multiple:
Waxaad ka tirsan tahay {{PLURAL:$1|koox|kooxo}} {{PLURAL:$1|u baahan|u baahan yahay}} xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo. Si aad uga saarto habkan waa inaad:
  • ku darto hab kale oo xaqiijin laba-tallaabo ah, ama
  • naftaada ka saarto {{PLURAL:$1|kooxda|kooxaha}}.
oathauth-2fa-groups-notice-multiple-link: Si aad uga baxdo {{PLURAL:$1|kooxda|kooxo}} fadlan booqo:
oathauth-remove-lastkey-required: Ma saari kartid habkaaga ugu dambeeya ee xaqiijinta haddii aad ka tirsan tahay kooxo u baahan xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo. Fadlan ku dar hab kale oo xaqiijin ah ka hor intaadan kan ka saarin.
listgrouprights-restrictedgroups-cond-oa: Isticmaaluhu waxa uu haystaa xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo oo shaqaynaysa
